site.name: Woori Smart Bio
site.slogan: Engineered by Data, Grown by Design.
site.tagline: A green bio company standardizing functional botanical materials on a data-driven precision smart farm. The same quality in every batch.

footer.address: 149 Chaok-ro Yeoncheon-eup Yeoncheon-gun Gyeonggi-do Republic of Korea
footer.copyright: © 2026 Woori Smart Bio. All rights reserved.
footer.brandPromise: We cultivate plants on a data-driven precision smart farm. Our single promise is the same quality of functional botanical material in every batch.

hero.definition: On a data-driven precision-control smart farm, we develop and produce plant-based green bio materials standardized to API (active pharmaceutical ingredient) grade.
hero.subhead: MAT regulates a plant's metabolic pathways to reproduce the same quality in every batch regardless of season or climate.

items.need: Standardized functional botanical materials and ODM supply
MAT cultivation and precision smart farms
Growth roadmap, IP and production infrastructure

items.label: STATUS
items.caption: Venture company and corporate R&D center

problem.heading:
Botanicals shut out by the wall of standardization
A $54.7B botanical drug market awaits the answer

problem.label: STANDARDIZATION
problem.title: WSB plant compound standardization
problem.body: MAT cultivation and precision control regulate light, temperature, water and minerals to standardize plant and product compounds inside the pharma-spec band.

opportunity.label: OPPORTUNITY
opportunity.title: Botanical drug market $54.7B
opportunity.body: The FDA-aligned global botanical drug market grows from $54.7B in 2026 to $79.7B by 2031. Market entry has one prerequisite. A standardized API supply.

mat.heading:
MAT
We trigger the plant's own defense
to surface active compounds on purpose
mat.plain: MAT precisely controls light, temperature, water, and minerals to guide plants toward producing more active compounds, more consistently.
mat.value: So every batch can ship the same active-compound content, reliably.

diagram.note: Basis · in-house trial vs. same-cultivar control

mat.body: It maximizes active compound yield. Precision stressors are applied in stages to induce secondary metabolite production.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 01
stressors.title: UV-B Light
stressors.caption: Targeted wavelength induces secondary metabolite synthesis
stressors.tooltip: Secondary metabolites are the functional compounds a plant makes to defend itself. A specific UV wavelength induces their synthesis.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 02
stressors.title: Thermal Shock
stressors.caption: Short heat and cold pulses trigger defense pathways
stressors.tooltip: Brief, sharp temperature swings stress the plant and wake its defense pathways.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 03
stressors.title: Water Deficit
stressors.caption: Controlled drought stress without compromising survival
stressors.tooltip: Water supply is deliberately reduced to induce drought stress.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 04
stressors.title: Mineral Cue
stressors.caption: Specific nutrient blends activate biosynthesis routes
stressors.tooltip: EC measures nutrient concentration in the solution. Specific blends activate biosynthesis routes.

fda.heading:
The FDA's five guidelines
WSB is structured to address the core production requirements
fda.lede: The five core requirements the FDA applies to botanical drug approval. Conventional cultivation struggles to address them at the same time. WSB's precision-controlled smart farm and MAT are structured around all five.

rows.wsb: Only genetically validated seeds. DNA marker verification of identity
Digital SOP controls every environmental variable. Every step recorded as data
Closed-type fully isolated facility. Heavy metals, pesticides, and microbes blocked at source
Active compound consistency across batches. Chemical fingerprint database built
365-day identical-condition production. Long-term supply stability data secured

traction.heading:
Backed by data
Supported by production scale
traction.lede: MAT and the precision-controlled smart farm prove active-compound gains and batch consistency with data, backed by the Yeoncheon R&D production center's capacity and our clinical material supply record.

saponin.label: SAPONIN ↑
saponin.caption: Ginsenoside content vs. control group
saponin.source: WSB internal analysis · same-cultivar control · HPLC

batch.label: BATCH VARIATION
batch.caption: Across all key compounds batch to batch

traction.networkNote: We collaborate with partners in Korea and abroad across solution, material, and brand lines. Publishable contracts and milestones are posted to News as they progress.

business.heading:
Technology · Material · Brand
A three-pillar vertical stack

pillars.label: PILLAR 01
pillars.title: B2B Solution
pillars.subtitle: Technology as a product
pillars.body: We supply MAT cultivation recipes, control software, and smart farm facilities as one integrated solution that closes a customer's technology gap in a single deal.
pillars.metricCaption: Recipe, control software, and facility as one

pillars.label: PILLAR 02
pillars.title: B2B Material
pillars.subtitle: Standardized API supply
pillars.body: A stable revenue base, producing and supplying everything from cGMP-ready API-oriented materials to nutraceutical and cosmetic botanicals in-house.

pillars.label: PILLAR 03
pillars.title: Phytopresso
pillars.subtitle: Validating value as a brand
pillars.body: A premium healthcare brand on hydroponic ginseng that validates our technology in the consumer market.
pillars.metricCaption: Hydroponic Ginseng SHOT · Angelica DECURSIN · Dendropanax CGA
cases: B2C distribution outsourced to an influencer-marketing specialist

news.heading: Latest updates
news.lede: Contracts, clinical material supply, and certifications from our operating pipeline.

items.title: Recognized as a Green Bio enterprise
items.summary: Recognized by MAFRA as a Green Bio industry company.

items.title: National R&D project · Smart Farm Multi-Ministry Package
items.summary: Carrying out the MAFRA intelligent aeroponic hydroponic system development project. Running through 2027.

global partnership
contact.lede: We respond to API supply, technology solutions, and clinical collaboration inquiries within two business days.

form.name: Contact name

form.consent: I agree to the collection and use of personal information.
form.privacyBody: Purpose: receiving and responding to inquiries. Items collected: company, contact name, email, phone, country, and message. Retention: deleted without delay once the inquiry is resolved, except where retention is required by law. You may decline consent, in which case we cannot process your inquiry.

roadmap.subtitle: Woori Smart Bio growth roadmap
roadmap.heading:
From the home market
to the global botanical drug standard
roadmap.lede: On an FDA-ready foundation and a proven track record, WSB expands step by step from global raw-material supplier to botanical data platform.

phases.label: PHASE 01
phases.title: Foundation and validation
bullets: GACP certification and FDA botanical-drug guideline alignment
Lead the B2B high-potency botanical material market
Commercialize three or more pipelines beyond ginseng

phases.label: PHASE 02
phases.title: Global expansion and scale-up
bullets: Full-scale export of MAT-AI smart farm solutions
Registered FDA botanical drug API supplier

phases.label: PHASE 03
phases.title: Market leadership and standards
bullets: Core API supplier in the global botanical drug market
Botanical data platform built on proprietary cultivation and bioactive data
AI-driven new-material discovery and personalized healthcare
